title: justicia sulfurea
intro: Justicia sulfurea, also known as the Golden Flame plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. Native to Southeast Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia sulfurea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Justicia sulfurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
